output: Batch 4 executed for T8 and T10. `EffectCreatorPanel` preview composition now passes `previewParamValues` into the effect component and re-memoizes when those values change, and `ClipPanel` now writes default params at all four required apply sites while rendering schema-merged `ParameterControls` for custom entrance/exit/continuous effects. Verification passed with a clean repo type check and targeted greps confirming the new preview-param flow and ClipPanel default/merge wiring. The batch checkpoint file was not writable, so no execution checkpoint was written.

task_updates.executor_notes: Extended `makePreviewComposition()` in `src/tools/video-editor/components/EffectCreatorPanel.tsx` to accept `effectParams` and pass them through as `params` on `EffectComponent`. Updated the memoized preview composition to depend on `previewParamValues`, so preview control changes now rebuild the preview component path. Repo type check passed, and targeted grep confirmed both the `params={effectParams}` prop and the updated `useMemo` dependency list.

Updated `src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/ClipPanel.tsx` so all four apply sites now write default params for custom effects: the entrance, exit, and continuous dropdown handlers each seed `params` from the selected effect schema, and the `EffectCreatorPanel` `onSaved` callback now applies `defaultParams` from the creator. Added custom-effect `ParameterControls` for entrance/exit/continuous using merged values `{...getDefaultValues(schema), ...storedParams}` to handle schema evolution safely, and each control updates clip params immediately through `onChange`. Repo type check passed, and targeted grep confirmed the default-param helpers, merged-value path, parameter controls, and widened `onSaved` callback.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `EffectCreatorPanel` preview composition now passes `previewParamValues` into the effect component via `params={effectParams}`, and the memoized `PreviewComposition` now depends on `previewParamValues`, so slider/control changes update the preview path.

Yes. All four ClipPanel apply sites now write default params: the entrance, exit, and continuous dropdowns each use schema-derived defaults for custom effects, and the `EffectCreatorPanel` `onSaved` callback applies `defaultParams`. `ParameterControls` now render with merged values `{...getDefaultValues(schema), ...storedParams}` for schema evolution safety, and each control writes updated clip params immediately through `onChange`.
